title: xAI Recognizer Options
description: xAI-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'xai'.

apiKey.description: xAI API key. Overrides the key configured in jambonz.

endpointing.description: Milliseconds of silence before an utterance is considered final. Range 0-5000.

fillerWords.description: Include filler words (um, uh) in transcript.

keyterms.description: Key terms to boost recognition for.

smartTurnTimeout.description: Maximum milliseconds of silence to wait before forcing an end-of-turn final result. Range 1-5000.
